title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
